zh.lifeSummary: 當Emma de Laval於1096年出生在英國英格蘭諾圖波藍德錫頓 德拉瓦爾時，她的父親Robert DeLaval Lord of Seaton31歲，母親Anna d'Arsley27歲。她於1116年與Sir Ralph De Mohaut結婚。他們至少是1個女兒的父母。她去世於1138年在威爾士福林爾哈沃登享年42歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Laval
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French: topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, Old French val (originally feminine, later masculine; see Val , compare Lavallee ), or a habitational name from Laval, the name of several places in various parts of France, ultimately derived from Latin vallis ‘valley’.

variants.name: Val
meanings: Spanish: variant of Valle , from val, a variant of valle ‘valley’. Compare Delval .
Galician and Portuguese: topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, val (compare 3 below). Compare also Doval .

French and Haitian: topographic name for someone who lived in a valley, (Old) French val (originally feminine, later masculine; compare Vallee ), from Latin vallis (feminine). Compare Duval and Laval .

nameMeanings.name: Emma
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Old French name, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, originally a short form of compound names such as Ermintrude containing the word erm(en), irm(en) ‘entire’. It was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, but its popularity in medieval England was greatly enhanced by the fact that it had been borne by the mother of Edward the Confessor, herself a Norman. In modern times, it was only in moderate use early in the 20th century but rose sharply in favour in the 1970s and has since remained perennially popular.

en.lifeSummary: When Emma de Laval was born in 1096, in Seaton Delaval, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom, her father, Robert DeLaval Lord of Seaton, was 31 and her mother, Anna d'Arsley, was 27. She married Sir Ralph De Mohaut in 1116. They were the parents of at least 1 daughter. She died in 1138, in Hawarden, Flintshire, Wales, at the age of 42.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Emma de Laval est née en 1096, à Seaton Delaval, Northumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Robert DeLaval Lord of Seaton, avait 31 ans et sa mère, Anna d'Arsley, avait 27 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Ralph De Mohaut en 1116. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fille. Elle est décédée en 1138, à Hawarden, Flintshire, Galles, à l’âge de 42 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Emma de Laval 1096 in Seaton Delaval, Northumberland, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Robert DeLaval Lord of Seaton 31 und ihre Mutter Anna d'Arsley 27. Sie hat 1116 Sir Ralph De Mohaut geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Tochter. Sie starb 1138 im Alter von 42 Jahren in Hawarden, Flintshire, Wales.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Emma de Laval è nata il nel 1096 nel Seaton Delaval, Northumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Robert DeLaval Lord of Seaton, aveva 31 anni e sua madre, Anna d'Arsley, aveva 27 anni. Lei sposato Sir Ralph De Mohaut nel 1116. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlia. Morì nel 1138, nel Hawarden, Flintshire, Galles, all'età di 42 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Emma de Lavalが1096年にイギリスイギリスノースウンバーランドセアトン デラヴァルで生まれた時，父Robert DeLaval Lord of Seatonは31歳，母Anna d'Arsleyは27歳であった。1116年にSir Ralph De Mohautと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1138年にウェールズフリントシュアイアハワーデンで42歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Emma de Laval(이)가 1096년 영국 잉글랜드 노르스벌랜드 시턴 데라발에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Robert DeLaval Lord of Seaton(은)는 31세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Anna d'Arsley(은)는 27세였다. 그녀는 1116년 Sir Ralph De Mohaut(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1138년 웨일스 플린츠히르 호르든에서 42세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Emma de Laval родилась в 1096 г. в местности ситон делаваль, нортумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Robert DeLaval Lord of Seaton было 31 год, а матери, которую звали Anna d'Arsley, 27. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Ralph De Mohaut в 1116 г. У них была по крайней мере 1 дочь. Она умерла в 1138 г. в местности хаварден, флинцхир, Уэльс в возрасте 42 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Emma de Laval nació en 1096, en Seaton Delaval, Northumberland, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Robert DeLaval Lord of Seaton, tenía 31 años y su mamá, Anna d'Arsley, tenía 27 años. Se casó con Sir Ralph De Mohaut en 1116. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hija. Murió en 1138, en Hawarden, Flintshire, Gales, a la edad de 42 años.
